visualizerParams.title: Barometric Formula Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The altitude calculation seems off. The exponent in the Barometric formula might be incorrect, leading to significant errors. Identify and fix the logic flaw.

solution.explanation: The bug was a typo in the exponent. The correct value is `1 / 5.255`, but the buggy code used `1 / 5.5255`. This small error could lead to significant altitude estimation inaccuracies.
